item.title: Admiral Paparo casts Bitcoin as a national-security tool, not a bet. 🛡️ Its proof-of-work could harden cyber defenses and project power worldwide. https://Blockchain.News/news/us-admiral-bitcoin-cybersecurity-power-projection #Bitcoin #Cybersecurity #NationalSecurity
